description: Per-rule maturity manifest per DD-A2. --enforce is REFUSED unless every required rule is stable.

E3.reason: Non-empty row check implemented and green (step 01-04).

E4.reason: Substantive-impact v1.1 implemented: DDD-N or row#N citation required (US-12, step 01-13). Closes stressor S1.

E5.reason: Protocol-surface preservation implemented and green in step 01-01.

R2.reason: Impact-must-cite rule implemented via E4 v1.1 (US-12, step 01-13). Enabled via --rule R2.

R3.reason: i18n config-extensible patterns not yet implemented (US-13, step 01-10).

enforce_eligibility.reason: All required rules (E1-E3b, E5) are stable. --enforce mode is unblocked (DD-A2).
